seoTitle: Stanhope Gardens vs Stanmore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Stanhope Gardens and Stanmore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Stanhope Gardens vs Stanmore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stanhope Gardens and Stanmore.
heading: Stanhope Gardens vs Stanmore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stanhope Gardens, New South Wales and Stanmore, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stanhope Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Stanmore (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Stanhope Gardens or Stanmore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stanhope Gardens has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Stanmore scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stanhope Gardens scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Stanmore scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stanhope Gardens or Stanmore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stanhope Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
